name: Tofu"cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 16 Graham crackers, crushed into fine crumbs
1/2 cup Pineapple, canned, crushed, no sugar added
1/4 cup Orange juice, frozen concentrate, thawed, no sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs with margarine and mix thoroughly. Using the back of the spoon, press the crumb mixture over the bottom and sides of a 9-inch glass pie plate.
3. Bake until crisp and brown, about 15 minutes. Transfer the pie crust to a wire rack to cool.
4. In a food processor or blender container, process tofu until creamy. Add pineapple, orange juice, vanilla, and honey, and process until smooth.
5. In a small cup, add cornstarch to lemon juice and stir to dissolve. Add this mixture to the tofu blend and process until smooth and thoroughly blended.
6. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust and bake at 325°F for 40-45 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
7. When cooled, garnish with kiwi slices, cover lightly, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Each serving (1/8th) is equal to: 1 serving bread, 1 serving Fat, 2 oz Legumes (tofu); 1/2 serving Fruits, 1 serving Extras (full choice plan). Per serving: 177 calories, 6 g protein, 7 g fat, 22 g carbohydrates, 190 mg sodium.
